perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black sports bra, is positioned in a close-up shot against a bedroom background. She starts with a slightly furrowed brow and a pouting expression. (2) As she speaks, her facial expressions become more animated, moving from a complaining look to one of wide-eyed disbelief. (3) The video ends with her maintaining a playful, shocked facial expression while looking directly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a clear, conversational, and slightly complaining tone. There is no background music. (2) The vocal energy increases slightly as she delivers the punchline of her story. (3) Only the main vocal and subtle ambient room noise are audible throughout the duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '我朋友' (My friend) - neutral tone. (2) Decorative Text: '騙我欸' (lied to me) - complaining tone. (3) Decorative Text: '素食者🌱' (vegetarian) - factual tone. (4) Functional Text: '她明明跟我說' (She clearly told me) - narrative tone. (5) Functional Text: '她看到肉' (She sees meat) - descriptive tone. (6) Functional Text: '會想要吐' (would want to vomit) - expressive tone. (7) Functional Text: '結果' (But then) - transition tone. (8) Functional Text: '我發現她' (I found out she) - revealing tone. (9) Functional Text: '有追蹤' (is following) - revealing tone. (10) Decorative Text: '肌肉男欸' (muscular men) - humorous punchline tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a black sports bra, filmed in a selfie-style close-up.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic bedroom setting with white pillows and a light-colored wall or headboard visible behind the subject.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a short comedy skit or personal anecdote intended to entertain viewers through a play on words. The creator tells a story about a friend who claims to be a vegetarian and finds meat disgusting, only to reveal the friend 'follows' (tracks/is interested in) 'muscular men' (a different kind of 'meat'). The humor relies on the linguistic double entendre and the creator's expressive facial reactions.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct eye contact with camera, reactive text overlays synchronized with speech.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a typical 'talking head' format popular on short-form video platforms to deliver a quick joke.
